title: 750+ Credit Score Kaise Banaye?
description:
Dekhiye kaise Simran ne apni dost ki loan rejection ki kahani se seekh kar, aapko civil score badhane ke kuch anmol tips diye hain. Iss video mein Simran, ek experienced accountant, aapko bata rahi hain ki kaise aap apna civil score 750+ tak le ja sakte hain bina kisi tension ke. Jaise ki EMI time par bharna, credit card limit ka sahi istemal karna, baar-baar loan ke liye apply na karna, aur purane credit cards ko na band karna. Ye sabhi steps aapke civil score ko positively impact karte hain. Toh agar aap bhi apne credit score ko sudhaarna chahte hain toh iss video ko dekhein aur apne doston ke saath zaroor share karein. 
 
Is video mein aap jaanenge 750+ credit score ka real secret. Time pe EMI payment, credit card ka sahi use, kam loan enquiries aur purane cards ko maintain karna — yeh chhoti aadatein credit score ko fast improve karti hain. Credit score ameeron ka nahi, discipline wale logon ka result hota hai. Agar loan approval chahte ho, toh aaj se yeh rules follow karo.
 
Discover essential tips for boosting your CIBIL score with Simran, your friendly chartered accountant. In this episode of "Money Saving Tips" Simran explains why maintaining a good credit score is crucial and offers practical steps to achieve a score of 750+. Learn the importance of timely EMI payments, proper credit card usage, and why you shouldn't frequently apply for new credit. Plus, understand how to improve your score through small loans and why keeping old credit cards active benefits your credit history. Join us for more finance management tips.
disclaimer: This video has been produced for education and awareness only. The securities/investments mentioned here are not recommendatory and do not assure future returns.

title: 3 Best Government Investment Schemes
description:
Kya aapko pata hai ki Bharat sarkar ki kuch schemes aapko FD se zyada returns aur 100% suraksha deti hain? Is video mein, Harsh Vora, ek certified financial planner, aapko top three government schemes ke baare mein batayenge jo aapke future ko secure kar sakte hain aur aapko crorepati bana sakte hain. Jaaniye PPF, Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana, aur NPS ke fayde, jo aapko zero risk mein high returns dete hain. In schemes ke baare mein adhik jaanne ke liye video zaroor dekhein. Ye schemes middle class families ke liye goldmine hai jo abhi bhi unexplored hai.
 
Is video mein hum Top 3 Government Investment Schemes discuss karenge jisme invest karke achha return generate kar sakte hai. 
 
Discover top government schemes in India that not only ensure the safety of your capital but also offer higher returns than fixed deposits. In this video, Harsh Vora, a certified financial planner and chartered wealth manager, shares insights on schemes like PPF, Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana, and NPS. These schemes are not widely known among middle-class families, potentially causing them to miss out on secure and lucrative investment opportunities. Learn how these government-backed schemes can help you achieve financial security, excellent retirement planning, and potentially turn you into a crorepati. Tune in to understand how these schemes provide a safe investment environment with guaranteed returns, unaffected by market volatility.
disclaimer: This video has been produced for education and awareness only. The securities/investments mentioned here are not recommendatory and do not assure future returns.

title: Aasan Tareeke Paisa Bachane Ke!
description:
Dosto, kya aap bhi paisa bachane ki koshish mein hamesha haar jaate ho? Is naye video mein Simran, ek chartered accountant, apni dost Ritu ki kahani share karti hain, jisne apni zindagi mein kuch aasaan badlav laakar paisa bachana shuru kiya. Video mein Simran teen aasaan aur turant apnane layak tarike batati hain jaise kharche ka record rakhna, rozmarra ki chhoti chizon par control, aur sadgi bhara lifestyle apnana. Ye tips aapko bhi madad karenge apni bachat journey shuru karne mein. Zaroor dekhein aur aage share karein!
 
Is episode mein Simran ek real-life example ke through batati hain kaise Ritu ne paise bachane ki aadat develop ki. Aap seekhenge 3 simple aur practical tareeke—daily kharch likhna, chhoti bachat par focus karna aur simple lifestyle apnana. Yeh tips beginners ke liye perfect hain jo bina pressure ke savings shuru karna chahte hain. Chhoti aadatein kaise badi financial change laati hain, yeh video zaroor dikhata hai
 
Discover essential money-saving tips with Simran, your chartered accountant friend. In this video, Simran reveals three simple strategies that transformed her friend Ritu's financial habits, enabling her to save significantly. Learn how to track and control daily expenses, make small daily savings, and adopt a simple lifestyle. Whether it's cutting down on unnecessary snacks or understanding the difference between needs and wants, these practical tips will guide you on your journey to financial discipline and savings. Ideal for anyone looking to manage their finances better, watch the video now for valuable insights and start saving today!
disclaimer: This video has been produced for education and awareness only. The securities/investments mentioned here are not recommendatory and do not assure future returns.

title: Top 3 Monthly Income Options
description:
Is video mein, Harsh Vara aapko batayenge teen powerful monthly income options ke baare mein, jisse aap har mahine achhi khaasi income generate kar sakte hain. Video mein discuss kiye gaye options mein high dividend paying stocks, corporate bonds and NCDs, aur real estate investment trusts (REITs) shamil hain. Harsh, jo ki ek certified financial planner aur AMFI registered distributor hai, aapko ye bhi samjhate hain ki kaise aap apne investments se stable aur regular income prapt kar sakte hain, wo bhi seedhe aapke bank account mein. Is video ko dekhne ke liye end tak bane rahiye aur aap bhi jaaniye ki kaise smart investments se har mahine extra income kamai ja sakti hai.
 
Is video mein hum Har Mahine Regular Income earn karne ke 3 best tarike practical calculation aur example ke sath detail mein seekhenge.
 
Explore effective monthly income options with Harsh Vara, a certified financial planner, as he unveils three powerful investment strategies on the Sego Official Show Family Finance Planning. Discover how investments in high dividend-paying stocks like Coal India, corporate bonds, and REITs like Embassy can yield returns ranging from ₹4,000 to ₹10,000 monthly directly into your bank account. Ideal for everyone from middle-class families to retired professionals and young investors, these options ensure a steady income without depending solely on a salary. Watch the full video to get detailed insights and start building your income-generating portfolio today!
disclaimer: This video has been produced for education and awareness only. The securities/investments mentioned here are not recommendatory and do not assure future returns.

title: Har Mahine Fixed Income Kamao
description:
ki is video mein humne passive income ke kai srot aur investment ke vikalpon ka vistar se varnan kiya hai. Har roz, hafte ya mahine aapke account mein fixed amount credit hone ke tareeko par charcha ki gayi hai, jaise peer to peer lending, bonds, debentures, aur systematic withdrawal plans. Yadi aap bhi apni salary ke alawa kuch extra kamai karna chahte hain, to is video se aapko passive income sources aur smart investment options samajhne mein madad milegi. Iske alawa, humne real estate investment trusts (REITs) ke fayde bhi bataye hain jo aapko rental income aur capital appreciation dono pradan karte hain. Aaiye seekhte hain passive income banane ke innovative aur secure tareeke.
 
Is video mein hum Monthly Fixed Income kamane ke alag alag tarike practical example ke sath detail mein seekhenge . 
 
Discover the potential of passive income with the 's insightful video on personal finance. Learn about diverse investment strategies, from peer-to-peer lending with substantial annual returns to the stability of corporate bonds and the dynamic stock market dividends. Explore the power of systematic investment plans (SIPs) in mutual funds for long-term growth and how real estate investment trusts (REITs) can provide monthly rental incomes without the hassles of property management. Join us to unlock financial freedom with innovative income streams that don't require hefty initial investments. Start with as little as one thousand rupees and watch your wealth grow.
disclaimer: This video has been produced for education and awareness only. The securities/investments mentioned here are not recommendatory and do not assure future returns.

title: Stockmarket Mein Invest Kare Ya Nahi?
description:
Is video mein, hum stock market ke myths ko todte hue aapko dikha rahe hain ki kaise ye India ka sabse bada wealth creation machine hai. Jane ki kaise Mukesh Ambani, Ratan Tata ki family trust aur India ke top 100 richest families ne stock market se apni wealth multiply ki hai. Video mein aapko milenge facts aur data jo Forbes se pramanit hain, sath hi SEBI guidelines aur NSE research papers ka zikr bhi hai jo stock market ko legitimate, regulated aur transparent investment platform batate hain. Yahan aapko sikhne ko milega ki kaise calculated risk ke sath stock market mein invest karke aap apni wealth bada sakte hain aur kaise blind gambling se ye alag hai. Video end tak dekhein aur stock market ke baare mein apni soch badlein.
 
Is video mein hum Stock Market mein Invest karna kitna safe hai aur aapko Invest karna chahiye ya nahi ye seekhenge.
 
Explore the truth about stock market investment in this eye-opening video from the official show of Family Finance Planning. Learn why the stock market is not gambling but a powerful wealth creation tool, as demonstrated by examples like Mukesh Ambani and Ratan Tata's investment successes. Understand the clear differences between blind gambling and informed investing through accessible financial data, SEBI guidelines, and long-term performance research. Discover how smart investors use the stock market to their advantage and multiply their wealth, debunking myths and revealing strategies to become wealthy. Essential viewing for anyone looking to make informed investment decisions.
disclaimer: This video has been produced for education and awareness only. The securities/investments mentioned here are not recommendatory and do not assure future returns.

title: LIC Vs SIP Kaun Best?
description:
ki is naye video mein, hum aapko financial planning aur investment ki duniya ka ek anokha nazariya dete hain. Aksar log LIC policies mein invest karte hain sochkar ki wo safe hain, lekin kya yeh sach mein aapko ameer banata hai? Is video mein, hum LIC aur SIP investments ke beech ke antar ko samjhate hain aur batate hain ki kaise SIP ke zariye aap zyada wealth create kar sakte hain, inflation ko maat dekar. Hum aapko yeh bhi batayenge ki insurance aur investment alag hain aur aapko dono ko kaise manage karna chahiye. Jaise ki term insurance aur health insurance ka chayan karna aur baki paiso ko mutual funds mein invest karna. Yadi aap apne paison ko sahi jagah invest karna chahte hain aur long term mein achhe returns chahte hain, toh yeh video aapke liye hai. Like aur feedback zaroor dein!
 
Is video mein hum LIC aur SIP ko compare karenge aur aapke liye konsa option sabse best hai ye seekhenge.
 
Discover the truth about financial security and wealth creation in this eye-opening video from the C official show on family financial planning. Learn why traditional LIC policies might not be the best investment for beating inflation and securing real growth. Explore the advantages of SIPs in mutual funds, which can offer significantly higher returns and help manage inflation effectively. Understand the distinct roles of insurance and investment, and why keeping them separate is crucial for true financial health. Get expert advice on opting for term plans for better coverage at lower premiums and reallocating your investments to maximize returns through the power of compounding. This video is a must-watch for anyone looking to review their financial strategies and ensure long-term wealth creation beyond mere paper value.
disclaimer: This video has been produced for education and awareness only. The securities/investments mentioned here are not recommendatory and do not assure future returns.

title: Free Bank Account Kaise Khole?
description:
Dekho, naya video aaya hai jismein Simran, aapki Chartered Accountant dost, batayengi kaise aap zero balance account khol sakte hain aur faaltu ke charges aur penalties se bach sakte hain. Is video mein Simran ne PM Jan Dhan Yojana, Digital Saving Account, aur basic savings account ke benefits bataye hain. Aapko sirf Aadhar card, PAN card, aur ek passport size photo chahiye account kholne ke liye. Video dekho aur jaano ki kaise ye accounts kholne mein aasan hai, koi minimum balance nahi rakhna padta aur na hi koi charges lagte hain. Share karo apne doston aur family ke saath aur tips paane ke liye Sikhoo app ko follow karte raho!
 
Minimum balance na rakhne par penalty lagti hai, par aaj ke time me zero-balance accounts bilkul free milte hain! Is video me Simran batayegi kaise aap PM Jan Dhan, Digital Savings, ya BSBDA accounts bina paperwork, bina penalty aur bina minimum balance ke open kar sakte ho. Simple steps, required documents, aur common mistakes—sab kuch clear. Bank charges se bacho, smart banking shuru karo!
 
Explore the benefits of zero balance accounts in our latest video, where Simran, a Chartered Accountant, dives into the advantages of managing your finances without the hassle of maintaining a minimum balance. Learn about three types of zero balance accounts available in India, including the popular PM Jan Dhan Yojana, Digital Savings Accounts through platforms like Paytm, Airtel Payments Bank, and Kotak, and the basic savings accounts offered by major banks. Discover the simple steps to open these accounts with minimal documentation and how to avoid unnecessary penalties and fees. Perfect for students and housewives, this guide provides practical insights into smarter banking practices. Join Simran on for more money-saving tips!
disclaimer: This video has been produced for education and awareness only. The securities/investments mentioned here are not recommendatory and do not assure future returns.

title: Reject Loan Kaise Approve Karaye?
description:
Agar aapka loan baar-baar reject ho raha hai aur aap samajh nahi pa rahe ki kyun, to hamari is video mein aapko milenge 5 powerful tips jo aapke loan approval chances ko badha sakte hain. Hum aapko batayenge ki kaise aap apne CIBIL score ko improve kar sakte hain, timely repayments kaise karein, aur sahi lender kaise choose karein. Saath hi, main aapko teen trusted apps - Branch, Pepic, aur Credit Bee ke baare mein bhi batunga, jahan se aap urgently loan le sakte hain. Iske alawa, aapko income proof ke bina loan milega kaun-kaun se apps se, ye bhi share karenge. Toh, agar aapko loan lena hai toh is video ko zaroor dekhein aur apne dosto ke saath share karein. Join karein hamare saath 'Easy Loan Guide' show mein aur janiye loan se judi saari jaankari.
 
Reject Loan Approve kese Kare Janiye Is Video Ke Madhyam Se
 
Struggling with frequent loan rejections? Tune into our video on the 'Easy Loan Guide' where we offer 5 crucial tips to turn your loan rejections into approvals. Discover how to enhance your civil score, choose the right lender, and the importance of timely repayments. We also reveal top apps like Branch, Pepic, and Credit Bee for urgent loan needs, and discuss options for obtaining loans without income proof. Whether it's improving your credit or selecting the right financial product, this video is your ultimate guide to navigating loan approvals efficiently.
disclaimer: This video has been produced for education and awareness only. The securities/investments mentioned here are not recommendatory and do not assure future returns.

title: Mudra Loan Financial Support
description:
Agar aap ek salary person hain aur soch rahe hain apna khud ka business shuru karne ka, to 'Personal Finance Gyan' ke is video mein aapko Mudra Loan ke baare mein puri jaankari milegi. Mudra Loan, jo ki ek government initiative hai, bina kisi collateral ke, aath se das percent interest rate par available hai. Ye loan vyapariyon aur choti dukaan daro ko unke business ko start ya expand karne mein madad karta hai. Loan teen categories mein available hai: Shishu, Kishor, aur Tarun, jo ₹50,000 se ₹20 lakh tak cover karte hain. Is video mein Mudra Loan ki eligibility, application process, aur benefits ke baare mein vistaar se samjhaya gaya hai. Jankari ke liye video dekhein aur apne business dream ko sakar karein.
 
Mudra loan ke bade mai janiye iss video mai.
 
Explore the benefits of Mudra Loan for budding and existing entrepreneurs in our latest video on Personal Finance Gyan. Learn how Mudra Loan, a government initiative, aids in acquiring capital for your business without collateral, offering loans from ₹50,000 to ₹20 lakhs at interest rates similar to home loans. Discover eligibility criteria, the application process, and insights on managing your business finances effectively. Ideal for small to medium enterprise owners looking to start or scale their operations. Join us to transform your entrepreneurial dreams into reality with the right financial tools.
disclaimer: This video has been produced for education and awareness only. The securities/investments mentioned here are not recommendatory and do not assure future returns.
